data.body: MILESTONE: changes 537(df83) 538(bdbe) 540(8368) 541(df7b) all Verified+1 AND LLM-Review+1 (fully green). Closed all 4 tickets - each signed BOTH plan-review + completion-verifier attestations. 542(8f43) 543(2202) 544(b1ea) CI running. 7 implemented, 4 closed. Now implementing remaining 12 test-only stories starting with b6c5 (p0 sync detached-HEAD).
